{{Quote|The main ingredients are cyanogen silicate, ardanium and accellerite, but don't worry—I'm already mixing the solution and we're all still alive.|Archiban Kimble|<ref name="Looking" />}}
'''Ardanium''' was a [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] that grew stronger in the presence of [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]], making it incredibly useful in the construction of [[Fuel cell/Legends|fuel cells]] for large [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Ardanium also had medical applications, but the material's primary use in [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] cells made it highly valuable. The discovery of an ardanium reserve on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Questal/Legends|Questal]] around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] led to the [[Ardanium Rush]], in which thousands of entrepreneurs and [[Miner/Legends|miners]] traveled to Questal in search of the mineral.

==Description==
Ardanium was a type of [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] that, when refined, had the unique property of growing stronger in the presence of [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]]. That made ardanium especially useful in the construction of [[Fuel cell/Legends|fuel cells]], as a [[Millimeter/Legends|millimeter]]-thin coating of ardanium allowed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to fashion [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] cells and [[Engine/Legends|engines]] that could be used in the construction of [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]].<ref name="Questal" /> Ardanium also had medical applications, as the [[xenopathologist]] [[Archiban Frodrick Kimble|Archiban Kimble]] used the mineral in conjunction with [[Accellerite/Legends|accellerite]] and [[cyanogen silicate]] to develop a cure for a rare [[Suudaa Nem'ro's disease|flesh-eating disease]].<ref name="Looking" /> [[Ardanium II]] was a material with similar properties to ardanium, though it was only used on smaller fuel cells.<ref name="Galaxies">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

==History==
Ardanium was known to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], as Kimble was able to acquire a supply of ardanium for his research in finding a cure for the flesh-eating disease afflicting the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Suudaa Nem'ro]].<ref name="Looking" /> Around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], an [[Agrirobot/Legends|agri-droid]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Questal/Legends|Questal]] turned over a rock that was embedded with ardanium. Upon learning of this, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the Galactic Empire realized that he could double the size of his [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] with the reserves on Questal, and entrepreneurs and [[Miner/Legends|miners]] began to arrive by the thousands in search of their fortunes. Prospectors in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Gralleenya]] ravaged the countryside around the settlement, leaving behind [[the Waste]]—a lifeless territory scarred by empty pits and [[Mining/Legends|mines]]. The [[Ardanium Rush]], as it came to be called, also drew criminal elements that established footholds on the planet, and Palpatine was forced to send [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor]] to restore order. Bandor halted the chaos with the support of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], though conflicts continued to break out as Questal's ardanium deposits were depleted over the next three [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. When agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] defeated Bandor, the Empire chose to abandon Questal, as very little ardanium remained.<ref name="Questal" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ardanium was first mentioned in the [[1990]] [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying]] adventure ''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]''.<ref name="Questal" />
